nasb.text: Moses then said to Aaron, “Come near to the altar and offer your sin offering and your burnt offering, that you may make atonement for yourself and for the people; then make the offering for the people, that you may make atonement for them, just as the Lord has commanded.”

esv.text: Then Moses said to Aaron, “Draw near to the altar and offer your sin offering and your burnt offering and make atonement for yourself and for the people, and bring the offering of the people and make atonement for them, as the Lord has commanded.”

cnv.text: 然後摩西對亞倫說：“走到祭壇那裡，獻上你的贖罪祭和燔祭，為自己和人民贖罪；又獻上人民的供物，按著耶和華的吩咐，為他們贖罪。”

ccb.text: 随后，摩西对亚伦说：“你要到坛前来，献上你的赎罪祭和燔祭，为自己和民众赎罪。也要按照耶和华的吩咐，为百姓献上他们的祭物，为他们赎罪。”
